Convergence Analysis

Architecture

Step 1 Data Collection — scripts/collectors/stooq_collector.py → data/raw/
Step 2 Local Cache — backtest/local_data.py (offline-ready)
Step 3 Backtest Engine — experts/orchestrator.py v4.0
Step 4 Structured Feedback — experts/structured_feedback.py
Step 5 Correlation Check — ρ>0.75 → weight × 0.5
Step 6 Paper Trade — 30-day holdout validation
Step 7 Git Version — every step committed

Git History
